'''[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Eistern''' was an officer of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] military, apparently an engineering specialist.

==Biography==
In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], he was serving with [[Sixth Negative Regions|Black Sword Command]], probably in the [[Black Fifteen]] shipyard at [[N'zoth]], when the [[Yevetha]] seized control of the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]]. He was one of several hundred thousand imperial captives herded onto [[Pa'aal]] to teach the Yevetha about technology like [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrives]] and [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]].

Eistern survived, however, rising to become a trusted lieutenant of [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Sil Sorannan]] in the secret command-structure plotting to free the Imperial survivors and ships from Yevethan control. In [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], he served as Sorannan's second-in-command aboard [[Intimidator (Executor-class)|''Intimidator'']], when they made good their escape. Betraying the Yevetha, he revealed the codes to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
